_meta.dna: compliance(system) = evidence(strong) x audit(absent) x consent(partial) x governance(missing) ~ 0
_meta.question_expansion_instruction: Each floor lists 7-10 seed questions. During execution, expand to 100 questions per persona by probing deeper into the domain.

name: Tower of Regulators
protocol: FORECAST -> CROSS-REF -> AUDIT -> FIX -> VERIFY -> SEAL -> POSTMORTEM

floors.persona_domain: EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR)
questions: Does the product implement GDPR Article 17 right-to-erasure with a data deletion API?
Is there a GDPR Article 20 data portability export endpoint?
Has a Data Protection Impact Assessment (DPIA) been conducted?
Is a Data Protection Officer (DPO) appointed per GDPR Article 37?
Does GA4 load on pages while the privacy policy states no Google Analytics is used?
Are evidence chains compatible with GDPR Article 30 record-keeping requirements?
Is the lawful basis for processing user data documented (consent, legitimate interest, etc.)?

floors.persona_domain: California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA)
questions: Is there a 'Do Not Sell My Personal Information' mechanism?
Does a comprehensive data inventory exist documenting all collected categories?
Does GA4 fire without providing an opt-out mechanism for California users?
Can consumers request disclosure of the categories of personal information collected?
Is there a verified consumer request process for data access and deletion?
Does the product distinguish between 'sale' and 'sharing' of personal information?
Is there a privacy notice meeting CCPA Section 1798.100 requirements?

floors.persona_domain: Brazil Lei Geral de Protecao de Dados (LGPD)
questions: Is there a Portuguese-language privacy notice for Brazilian users?
Is a DPO equivalent (Encarregado) designated per LGPD Article 41?
Does the Portuguese locale include legally required privacy and data handling text?
Can Brazilian users exercise their data rights in Portuguese?
Is there a lawful basis documented for processing Brazilian user data?
Does the product comply with LGPD's data minimization principle?
Is cross-border data transfer from Brazil documented with adequate safeguards?

floors.persona_domain: China Personal Information Protection Law (PIPL)
questions: Does the product implement data localization for Chinese user data?
Is there a cross-border data transfer mechanism compliant with PIPL?
Does the zh-TW/zh-CN conflation (Paper 35) affect PIPL compliance messaging?
Is there a local data storage option for Chinese users?
Does the product's local-first architecture satisfy PIPL data localization requirements?
Is personal information processing consent obtained per PIPL Article 13?
Is there a PIPL-specific privacy assessment for cross-border transfers?

floors.persona_domain: South Africa Protection of Personal Information Act (POPIA)
questions: Is an Information Officer registered per POPIA Section 55?
Does a PAIA (Promotion of Access to Information Act) manual exist?
Is there a Section 18 notification to data subjects?
Is consent for processing personal information obtained per POPIA requirements?
Does the product's evidence chain support POPIA's accountability principle?
Is there a data breach notification procedure meeting POPIA's 72-hour requirement?
Can South African users exercise their rights under POPIA in their local context?

floors.persona_domain: Thailand/Singapore Personal Data Protection Act (PDPA)
questions: Is there a consent record-keeping mechanism for PDPA compliance?
Is a DPO designated per PDPA requirements?
Does the product have a data breach notification procedure?
Can users withdraw consent and have their data deleted?
Does the product's purpose limitation align with PDPA's collection limitation?
Is there a retention limitation policy documented?
Does the local-first architecture support PDPA's data protection by design principle?

floors.persona_domain: Japan Act on Protection of Personal Information (APPI)
questions: Does the evidence chain architecture map to APPI record-keeping requirements?
Is there a cross-border consent mechanism for transferring data outside Japan?
Does the product's local-first architecture reduce APPI compliance burden?
Is the purpose of personal information use clearly specified per APPI?
Are APPI-required notifications provided to data subjects?
Does the product handle special care-required personal information per APPI?
Is the evidence chain structured to serve as APPI-compliant processing records?

floors.persona_domain: UK General Data Protection Regulation (post-Brexit)
questions: Are all EU GDPR gaps replicated for UK GDPR (same requirements)?
Is the product registered with the UK Information Commissioner's Office (ICO)?
Is a UK representative appointed per UK GDPR Article 27?
Does the product meet UK-specific data adequacy requirements for EU transfers?
Is there a UK-specific privacy notice?
Does the GA4 contradiction violate UK GDPR's transparency principle?
Are Standard Contractual Clauses (SCCs) in place for UK-EU data flows?

floors.persona_domain: US Health Insurance Portability and Accountability Act (HIPAA)
questions: Is there a Business Associate Agreement (BAA) template available?
Are Protected Health Information (PHI) handling procedures documented?
Does the product implement access controls specific to healthcare data?
Can the evidence chain serve as a HIPAA-compliant audit trail?
Is there a risk assessment for handling healthcare-related data?
Does the product's encryption (AES-256-GCM) meet HIPAA's technical safeguards?
Are minimum necessary standards enforced when processing healthcare data?

floors.persona_domain: US FDA 21 CFR Part 11 (electronic records and signatures)
questions: Does the evidence chain implement ALCOA+ principles (Attributable, Legible, Contemporaneous, Original, Accurate)?
Are approval gates functioning as valid electronic signatures per Part 11?
Does the SHA-256 hash chain provide tamper-evident audit trails?
Is there a formal validation protocol (IQ/OQ/PQ) for the evidence chain?
Is a 21 CFR Part 11 mapping document available?
Are electronic records with integrity maintained through hash-chained evidence?
Does the approval gate with 30-second auto-deny satisfy Part 11 signature requirements?

floors.persona_domain: UK Medicines and Healthcare products Regulatory Agency (MHRA)
questions: Is there UK-specific GxP documentation mapping to MHRA requirements?
Does the product have an Annex 11 (computerized systems) mapping document?
Does the evidence chain meet MHRA data integrity expectations (ALCOA+)?
Is there a validated system state for GxP-regulated use?
Does the product support MHRA's expectations for electronic records?
Are change control procedures documented for system updates?
Is there a supplier qualification process for the LLM providers used?

floors.persona_domain: European Medicines Agency (EMA) GxP validation
questions: Is there a GxP validation strategy document?
Are clinical data integrity procedures defined?
Does the product meet EMA expectations for computerized system validation?
Is there a risk assessment for using the product in GxP-regulated environments?
Are audit trails compliant with EMA Annex 11 requirements?
Does the evidence chain support EMA's data integrity requirements?
Is the product's change management process documented for GxP compliance?

floors.persona_domain: Australia Therapeutic Goods Administration (TGA)
questions: Is there an Australian regulatory mapping document?
Is a local representative appointed for Australian regulatory purposes?
Does the product meet TGA's expectations for computerized systems in clinical contexts?
Is the evidence chain compliant with TGA's data integrity requirements?
Are Australian-specific privacy requirements (Privacy Act 1988) addressed?
Does the product handle Australian healthcare data per TGA guidelines?
Is there a TGA-specific risk assessment for the evidence chain?

floors.persona_domain: Health Canada pharmaceutical and device regulation
questions: Is there a Canadian regulatory mapping document?
Does the product meet bilingual requirements (EN/FR) for health contexts?
Is the French locale complete enough for Health Canada compliance?
Does the evidence chain meet Health Canada's GxP data integrity expectations?
Are PIPEDA (privacy) requirements addressed for Canadian healthcare use?
Is there a Canadian representative for regulatory communications?
Does the product support Health Canada's electronic signature requirements?

floors.persona_domain: World Health Organization digital health data integrity
questions: Does the evidence chain map to WHO digital health data integrity principles?
Is there an implementation guide for WHO-aligned data integrity?
Does the product support WHO's recommendations for digital health interventions?
Can the evidence chain serve as a WHO-quality audit trail for health data?
Does the product's local-first architecture support WHO's data sovereignty principles?
Is there documentation mapping product features to WHO digital health standards?
Does the product address WHO's concerns about AI in healthcare decision-making?

floors.persona_domain: International Council for Harmonisation E6(R3) Good Clinical Practice
questions: Does the evidence chain align with ICH E6(R3) data integrity requirements?
Is the hash chain structure compatible with GCP audit trail requirements?
Does the product's evidence capture meet ICH's quality-by-design principles?
Can the evidence chain support a clinical trial audit?
Is there a formal mapping of product capabilities to ICH E6(R3) requirements?
Does the product address ICH's expectations for electronic source data?
Are there controls for ensuring data is attributable and contemporaneous per ICH?

floors.persona_domain: Payment Card Industry Data Security Standard (PCI-DSS)
questions: Is the cardholder data environment (CDE) documented?
Is payment processing correctly delegated to Stripe (no cardholder data stored locally)?
Is there a PCI scope documentation showing what is in scope and what is not?
Does the product store, process, or transmit cardholder data anywhere?
Is PCI DSS compliance correctly scoped to Stripe as the payment processor?
Are there any API endpoints that could inadvertently handle payment card data?
Does the product maintain a SAQ (Self-Assessment Questionnaire) for its PCI scope?

floors.persona_domain: Sarbanes-Oxley Act (SOX) internal controls
questions: Is internal controls documentation available for financial reporting?
Is there segregation of duties in the development and deployment process?
Is a change management audit trail maintained?
Does the evidence chain support SOX Section 302 certification requirements?
Are financial records immutable and auditable?
Is there a documented control environment for the product?
Can the product demonstrate compliance with SOX Section 404 internal controls?

floors.persona_domain: Basel III banking regulation operational risk
questions: Is operational risk documentation available if banks use Solace for tasks?
Does the product meet Basel III's IT risk management requirements?
Is there an operational risk framework for AI-assisted banking tasks?
Can the evidence chain support banking regulatory audit requirements?
Are there controls for managing operational risk from AI agent actions?
Does the product's fail-closed design align with banking risk management?
Is there documentation for operational resilience of automated banking tasks?

floors.persona_domain: Markets in Financial Instruments Directive II
questions: Are transaction recording requirements met if financial advisors use Solace?
Does the evidence chain satisfy MiFID II's record-keeping requirements?
Is there documentation for best execution obligations in automated tasks?
Can the product's audit trail support MiFID II compliance demonstrations?
Are client communication archival requirements addressed?
Does the product meet MiFID II's transparency requirements for automated advice?
Is there a regulatory mapping for MiFID II applicability?

floors.persona_domain: EU Digital Operational Resilience Act (DORA)
questions: Is there an ICT risk management framework per DORA Article 6?
Does the product have an incident reporting procedure per DORA requirements?
Is third-party risk management documented for LLM providers?
Does the product's resilience testing meet DORA's digital operational resilience standards?
Is there a business continuity plan for the product's automated services?
Are ICT third-party dependencies (Together.ai, OpenRouter) risk-assessed per DORA?
Does the product maintain information registers of ICT third-party arrangements?

floors.persona_domain: US Securities and Exchange Commission record retention
questions: Is there a record retention policy (SEC requires 3-7 year retention)?
Is communication archival implemented for regulatory compliance?
Does the evidence chain support SEC's electronic recordkeeping requirements?
Can the product demonstrate compliance with SEC Rule 17a-4?
Are there controls preventing the destruction of required records?
Does the product's hash chain provide SEC-grade audit trail integrity?
Is there a legal hold capability for preserving records in litigation?

floors.persona_domain: UK Financial Conduct Authority
questions: Is there an FCA compliance mapping for the product?
Has a consumer duty assessment been conducted per FCA requirements?
Does the product meet FCA's expectations for treating customers fairly?
Is there documentation for FCA SYSC (Senior Management Arrangements)?
Does the evidence chain support FCA's record-keeping requirements?
Are there controls for managing conflicts of interest in automated financial tasks?
Does the product's pricing transparency meet FCA consumer duty standards?

floors.persona_domain: Monetary Authority of Singapore technology risk management
questions: Is there a technology risk management guidelines mapping for MAS?
Does the product have an outsourcing framework per MAS requirements?
Are MAS's cloud computing and AI governance requirements addressed?
Does the product meet MAS's expectations for technology risk controls?
Is third-party risk management documented for Singapore regulatory purposes?
Does the product's security architecture meet MAS's baseline standards?
Is there an incident response plan meeting MAS's notification requirements?

floors.persona_domain: EU Artificial Intelligence Act risk classification and oversight
questions: Is human oversight scoring 8/10 via approval gates (Article 14 compliance)?
Is there an AI system risk classification per the EU AI Act risk tiers?
Does a model card exist documenting which LLMs are used and their limitations?
Is the AI system registered in any EU AI Act registry?
Are transparency obligations met (Article 52) for AI-generated content?
Does the approval gate with 30-second auto-deny satisfy human oversight requirements?
Is there a conformity assessment for the AI system under the EU AI Act?

floors.persona_domain: US NIST AI Risk Management Framework
questions: Is the MAP function partially implemented (use cases documented)?
Is the MEASURE function implemented (bias testing, fairness metrics)?
Is the MANAGE function implemented (incident response for AI failures)?
Does the GOVERN function address organizational AI governance?
Is there a documented AI risk profile per NIST AI RMF?
Are AI-specific risks assessed and documented with mitigation strategies?
Does the product maintain an AI Bill of Materials?

floors.persona_domain: Canada Artificial Intelligence and Data Act
questions: Has an algorithmic impact assessment been conducted?
Is human oversight present in the AI decision pipeline?
Are bilingual (EN/FR) requirements met for AI disclosures?
Does the product meet AIDA's transparency requirements?
Is there documentation of the AI system's potential impacts?
Are there mechanisms for explaining AI decisions to affected individuals?
Does the product support AIDA's requirements for high-impact AI systems?

floors.persona_domain: China's AI regulation (algorithm filing, content labeling)
questions: Is there an algorithm filing prepared per China's algorithm registration requirements?
Is AI-generated content labeled per China's deep synthesis regulations?
Is there a deep synthesis service registration?
Does the product label AI-generated outputs distinctly from human content?
Are content recommendation algorithms documented per Chinese regulations?
Does the product address China's requirements for AI-generated content watermarking?
Is there a Chinese-market-specific compliance plan?

floors.persona_domain: UK AI Safety Institute pre-deployment testing
questions: Is human oversight strong (approval gates with evidence capture)?
Has pre-deployment testing been conducted per UK AI Safety Institute guidance?
Is there a safety case document for the AI system?
Has a frontier model evaluation been conducted?
Does the product document AI failure modes and mitigations?
Is there a mechanism for reporting AI safety incidents?
Does the product participate in any AI safety testing frameworks?

floors.persona_domain: Singapore Model AI Governance Framework
questions: Is human-in-the-loop present in the AI decision pipeline?
Is explainability addressed (evidence chains explain WHAT, but do they explain WHY)?
Has an algorithm audit been conducted?
Does the product meet Singapore's principles for responsible AI?
Is there documentation of the AI system's decision-making process?
Does the evidence chain support explainability requirements?
Are fairness considerations documented for the AI system?

floors.persona_domain: Japan AI Strategy and Society 5.0 principles
questions: Does human oversight align with Japan's Society 5.0 AI principles?
Has an AI impact assessment been conducted per Japanese guidelines?
Is there a transparency report for the AI system?
Does the product's approval gate philosophy align with Japanese deliberation culture?
Are there documented principles for AI ethics in the product?
Does the evidence chain support Japanese expectations for AI accountability?
Is the Japanese locale's politeness register (desu/masu) appropriate for regulatory contexts?

floors.persona_domain: IEEE 7000 ethically aligned design
questions: Are value-based design principles present (care, evidence, consent)?
Has a formal ethical impact assessment been conducted?
Is there an ethics board or ethical review process?
Does the product implement IEEE 7000's requirements for stakeholder engagement?
Are ethical considerations documented in the design process?
Does the product address IEEE 7000's transparency requirements?
Is there a mechanism for ethical review of new features or recipes?

floors.persona_domain: US Federal Trade Commission consumer protection
questions: Do marketing claims require substantiation per FTC standards?
Is the 'AI Worker Platform' claim tested by FTC standard for deceptive advertising?
Are endorsement disclosures present where required?
Does the product's pricing transparency meet FTC unfairness standards?
Are there any unfair or deceptive acts or practices under FTC Section 5?
Does GA4 tracking without disclosure constitute a deceptive trade practice?
Are testimonials genuine and properly disclosed?

floors.persona_domain: UK Competition and Markets Authority consumer duty
questions: Does the product meet CMA's consumer duty framework for transparency?
Is pricing transparent with no dark patterns in the UI?
Is cancel-anytime billing implemented without friction?
Does the feature comparison table accurately represent capabilities?
Is there a formal CMA compliance review?
Does the product's open architecture prevent anti-competitive lock-in?
Are consumer terms fair and clearly communicated?

floors.persona_domain: Australia Competition and Consumer Commission
questions: Is there Australian consumer guarantee documentation?
Is a local dispute resolution mechanism available for Australian users?
Do product claims meet Australian Consumer Law (ACL) substantiation requirements?
Is there an Australian-specific terms of service?
Does the product comply with ACCC's guidelines on digital platforms?
Are consumer remedies (repair, replace, refund) clearly documented?
Does the product meet ACCC's expectations for digital product quality?

floors.persona_domain: US Children's Online Privacy Protection Act (COPPA)
questions: Is there any age gate or age verification mechanism?
Is parental consent obtained before collecting data from users under 13?
Does a child-specific data handling policy exist?
Can a child access the product today with zero barriers (CRITICAL: yes)?
Are there FTC-enforceable COPPA violations (fines up to $5.7M per violation)?
Does the privacy policy state the product is not for under 13 while no code enforcement exists?
Is Paper 33 (Tower of Kids) finding of zero COPPA implementation addressed?

floors.persona_domain: US Controlling the Assault of Non-Solicited Pornography and Marketing Act
questions: Does the email infrastructure include a functioning unsubscribe mechanism?
Is a physical mailing address included in automated emails?
Is the opt-in vs opt-out distinction clearly implemented?
Are commercial emails properly identified as advertisements?
Does the unsubscribe mechanism process within 10 business days?
Are there controls preventing the product from sending spam via automated recipes?
Does the product's email automation comply with CAN-SPAM's header requirements?

floors.persona_domain: EU ePrivacy Directive (cookie consent and electronic communications)
questions: Does GA4 fire without user consent (Article 5(3) violation)?
Is there a cookie consent banner meeting ePrivacy requirements?
Does the privacy policy contradict actual tracking behavior (GA4)?
Is consent freely given, specific, informed, and unambiguous per GDPR Article 7?
Is a GA4 tracking pixel that contradicts the privacy policy an active misrepresentation?
Are all cookies and tracking technologies documented and consent-gated?
Does the product implement a consent management platform (CMP)?

floors.persona_domain: EU Digital Services Act (DSA) transparency and content moderation
questions: Is there a transparency report per DSA requirements?
Is there an illegal content flagging mechanism?
Does the product cooperate with trusted flaggers?
Is a point-of-contact designated for DSA purposes?
Are terms of service clearly communicated per DSA requirements?
Does the product implement DSA's transparency obligations for recommender systems?
Is there a mechanism for users to challenge content moderation decisions?

floors.persona_domain: EU Digital Markets Act (DMA) interoperability and gatekeeping
questions: Is the product subject to DMA gatekeeper designation?
Do interoperability requirements for browser automation apply?
Has an assessment been conducted for DMA applicability?
Does the product's open architecture support DMA's interoperability goals?
Are there any self-preferencing practices that violate DMA?
Does the product provide data portability per DMA requirements?
Is the product's business model compatible with DMA's fairness requirements?

floors.persona_domain: US Digital Millennium Copyright Act (DMCA)
questions: Is a designated DMCA agent registered with the US Copyright Office?
Is there a documented takedown procedure for copyright-infringing content?
Is the copyright status of AI-generated content clarified?
Does the product have a counter-notification procedure?
Is there a repeat infringer policy?
Are recipes that access copyrighted content evaluated for DMCA compliance?
Does the product's automated browsing raise DMCA Section 1201 (anti-circumvention) concerns?

floors.persona_domain: open source license compliance and dependency audit
questions: Is FSL-1.1-Apache-2.0 for solace-browser well-documented and correctly applied?
Is the dependency license audit complete across all projects?
Does a NOTICE file aggregate all third-party licenses?
Are there license-incompatible dependencies in any project?
Is the attribution chain complete for all open source dependencies?
Does the product comply with all transitive dependency license requirements?
Is the FSL-to-OSS conversion timeline (4 years) clearly communicated?

floors.persona_domain: AICPA SOC 2 Trust Services Criteria
questions: Is there any Trust Services Criteria documentation (security, availability, processing integrity)?
Are there documented controls for any of the SOC 2 trust principles?
Has a SOC 2 readiness assessment been conducted?
Is an audit engagement with a CPA firm in progress or planned?
Does the evidence chain architecture support SOC 2 monitoring controls?
Are logical access controls documented?
Is there a change management process documented per SOC 2 requirements?

floors.persona_domain: ISO/IEC 27001 Information Security Management System (ISMS)
questions: Does an Information Security Management System (ISMS) exist?
Has a risk assessment been conducted per ISO 27001 requirements?
Is there a Statement of Applicability (SoA) documenting selected controls?
Is there a controls catalog mapping to ISO 27001 Annex A?
Are information security policies documented?
Is there a risk treatment plan for identified security risks?
Has management review of the ISMS been conducted?

floors.persona_domain: Software Bill of Materials and supply chain security
questions: Does an SBOM exist in CycloneDX or SPDX format?
Is there dependency vulnerability scanning (pip-audit, npm audit)?
Is the software supply chain documented and transparent?
Does Executive Order 14028 (US) require SBOMs for government sales?
Will the EU Cyber Resilience Act require SBOMs by 2027?
Can the SBOM be generated with standard tools (syft, cdxgen)?
Are all transitive dependencies tracked and vulnerability-assessed?

floors.persona_domain: intellectual property protection and trade secrets
questions: Is trade secret protection via PRIVATE repos reasonable and documented?
Are there patent filings or a patent strategy documented?
Are IP assignment agreements documented for contributors?
Is the distinction between OSS, source-available, and private code clearly documented?
Does the product's licensing strategy protect core innovations?
Are trade secrets identified and protected with appropriate access controls?
Is there a freedom-to-operate analysis for key product features?

floors.persona_domain: ethics governance, whistleblower protection, ethical review
questions: Does an ethics board exist?
Is there a formal ethical review process for new features?
Is there a whistleblower channel and protection policy?
Do the 10 Uplift Principles (Paper 17) provide values but lack governance mechanism?
Is there an ethical impact assessment process?
Are stakeholder interests balanced in product decisions?
Is there a mechanism for ethical concerns to block product decisions?

floors.persona_domain: boss floor: AI self-inspection -- does this product have the legal right to exist in every jurisdiction?
questions: Can a user exercise their right to deletion, access, and portability today?
Does the product's tracking behavior match its privacy policy (GA4 contradiction)?
Can a regulator understand what AI models are used and what decisions they make?
Is there a human in the loop for every consequential AI decision?
Is a child protected from accessing or being harmed by this product?
If a data breach occurs at 3am on a Saturday, what happens?
Can you prove, with cryptographic certainty, what this system did and when?

floors.persona_domain: boss floor: the regulator with a pen -- consent decree test, can you prove compliance?
questions: Does the product's public-facing documentation match its actual behavior?
Does the product collect only what it needs, and can the user see what is collected?
Is consent freely given, specific, informed, and unambiguous?
Who is the Data Protection Officer, and who do you call at 3am?
Are security measures proportionate to the data being processed?
If ordered to fix something today, can you demonstrate remediation velocity?
Does this product pose systemic risk to the users it serves (eSign in-memory)?
